rejection_reasons: A current first WHO global guideline was available.
Patient pages are not exact clinician guidance.
Recurrent pregnancy loss is a distinct concept and was not used to support that alias.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for infertility evaluation, but not a full recurrent-pregnancy-loss or preconception workflow.
setting_applicability: Partial: WHO global guidance requires local adaptation and referral-pathway review.
UAE_applicability: No direct UAE applicability is established; UAE official sources were searched and national adaptation is required.
recency_verification: WHO publication page and exact 262-page PDF published 2025-11-28 were opened on 2026-07-12.
superseded_check: This is the first current global WHO infertility guideline; no later edition exists.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped fertility-concern, duration, menstrual, obstetric, partner, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, and prior-investigation history.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped BMI, thyroid, pelvic examination, semen, ovulation, tubal, uterine, and selected prior-test review.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped counselling, preferences, psychosocial support, referral discussion, and questions as clinician-documented decisions.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped infertility evaluation terms and clinician-selected hormone, ultrasound, and semen-analysis review.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.

unresolved_source_gaps: Recurrent pregnancy loss aliases, fixed follow-up intervals, hyperandrogenism examination, UAE legal or referral requirements, and treatment advice remain unsupported.
No infertility cause or diagnosis may be inferred from the workflow.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
